title: phyllanthus greenei
intro: Phyllanthus greenei, also known as the Green's Phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus greenei include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparation of Phyllanthus greenei often involves making teas, infusions, or decoctions from the leaves and roots, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
